HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_BOG.title: Fetish Bog
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_BOG.description: Enemy fetish slots are always visible. Each enemy starts with one random fetish.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FETISH_BOG.flavor: Once you sink in, you don't climb out.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HYPNOSIS_METRONOME.title: Hypnosis Metronome
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HYPNOSIS_METRONOME.descr: At the start of each combat, gain {DominationPower} [gold]Dom[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-STOLEN_HEART.title: Stolen Heart
HYPNOSISCREATOR-STOLEN_HEART.description: At the start of combat, gain 2 [gold]Block[/gold] for each Stolen Heart you own.
